data.title: China Merchants Securities Sets March 27 Board Meeting to Approve 2025 Results and Consider Final Dividend
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

China Merchants Securities Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6099) ) has shared an update.

China Merchants Securities Co., Ltd., a major Chinese securities firm listed in Hong Kong, has announced that its board of directors will convene on March 27, 2026 to review and approve the consolidated annual results for the year ended December 31, 2025. The meeting will also consider the publication of these results and a potential recommendation for a final dividend, signaling an upcoming update on the company’s financial performance and possible shareholder returns.

The announcement formally confirms the governance timetable for closing the 2025 financial year and outlines the board’s role in determining any final dividend proposal, which will be closely watched by investors for indications of earnings strength and capital distribution policy. The disclosure also reiterates the current composition of the board, underscoring the mix of executive, non-executive, employee representative and independent non-executive directors overseeing the company’s strategic and financial decisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:6099) stock is a Buy with a HK$17.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Merchants Securities Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:6099 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Merchants Securities Co., Ltd. Class H

China Merchants Securities Co., Ltd. is a PRC-incorporated joint stock company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 6099, operating in the financial services sector as a securities firm. The group provides brokerage, investment banking, asset management and related capital markets services to institutional and retail clients in mainland China and Hong Kong, positioning it as a key player in the regional securities industry.

Average Trading Volume: 5,630,961

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$153.2B

Learn more about 6099 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Koba Resources Limited ( (AU:KOB) ) has provided an update.

Koba Resources Limited has released its Interim Financial Report for the half-year ended 31 December 2025, providing investors with a consolidated view of its profit or loss, financial position, cash flows, and changes in equity. The report also includes directors’ commentary, condensed notes to the financial statements, and an independent auditor’s review, offering stakeholders a formal update on the company’s financial health and governance oversight during the period.

By publishing this interim report, Koba enhances transparency around its financial performance and capital structure at the mid-point of its financial year. The inclusion of an auditor’s independence declaration and review report helps reinforce confidence in the reliability of the disclosed figures, which can influence market perception, risk assessment, and investment decisions regarding the company.

data.title: Hiroshima Gas Announces Broad Management and Board Reshuffle Across Group
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Hiroshima Gas Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9535) ) has provided an announcement.

Hiroshima Gas Co., Ltd. has approved extensive leadership changes, nominating five new directors to be elected at the June 2026 shareholders’ meeting, including internal executives overseeing gas and corporate planning, as well as top leaders from Hiroshima Electric Railway, Hirogin Holdings and Iwatani Corporation. At the same time, several incumbent directors will retire or shift to advisory roles, signaling a refresh of board governance and deeper ties with key regional corporate partners.

The company is also overhauling its executive structure from April 1, 2026, appointing new executive officers from its supply safety, LNG terminal and residential sales operations, while senior executives transition to leadership roles at group subsidiaries such as Hiroshima Gas Propane and Hiroshima Gas Techno Service. Promotions to senior executive officer rank further consolidate management around core gas, safety and sales functions, indicating a generational shift and tighter integration across the Hiroshima Gas group’s operating companies.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9535) stock is a Hold with a Yen370.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hiroshima Gas Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:9535 Stock Forecast page.

More about Hiroshima Gas Co., Ltd.

Hiroshima Gas Co., Ltd. is a Japanese city gas utility listed on the TSE Prime market, supplying gas and related energy services, including LNG operations and pipeline businesses, primarily in the Hiroshima area. The company also operates through group firms in propane gas, technical services and energy-related sales, positioning itself as a regional integrated energy provider.

Average Trading Volume: 128,603

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen26.12B

See more insights into 9535 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Proact Names Corporate Development Chief Jonas Ekman as Deputy CEO
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Proact IT Group AB ( (SE:PACT) ) has issued an update.

Proact IT Group AB has appointed Jonas Ekman, currently VP Corporate Development, as Deputy CEO effective 1 April 2026, succeeding Magnus Lönn, who became President and CEO in March 2025. Ekman brings extensive experience in strategy, business development and M&A, and has played a central role in Proact’s strategic development and key acquisitions since joining the company in 2019.

In his expanded role, Ekman will support the CEO and Group Management in both operational and strategic work, while assuming greater responsibility for commercial areas such as brand development and supplier relations. He will retain his position as VP Corporate Development and Group Management member, reinforcing continuity in Proact’s ongoing transformation and its focus on value creation through acquisitions, innovation and growth.

Management highlights Ekman’s broad business acumen and leadership as important assets as Proact pursues its transformation agenda. The appointment signals a strengthening of the company’s leadership capacity to execute on its long-term strategy, which could further solidify Proact’s competitive positioning in the European cloud and data management market.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:PACT) stock is a Hold with a SEK104.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Proact IT Group AB stock, see the SE:PACT Stock Forecast page.

More about Proact IT Group AB

Proact IT Group AB is a European specialist in data and information management, focused on cloud services and data centre solutions. The company helps customers store, connect, protect and secure data, and extract value from it while improving agility, productivity and efficiency across Europe and North America.

Proact has completed thousands of projects worldwide, serves more than 4,000 customers and manages hundreds of petabytes of cloud data. Founded in 1994 and listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 1999 under the ticker PACT, the group employs over 1,100 people in 12 countries, underscoring its established position in the infrastructure and cloud services market.

Average Trading Volume: 68,967

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: SEK2.68B

For a thorough assessment of PACT stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from Scorpion Minerals Limited ( (AU:SCN) ) is now available.

Scorpion Minerals Limited has reported a change in director Peter Koller’s interests in the company’s securities, following on-market purchases of additional fully paid ordinary shares. Between 10 and 12 March 2026, Koller acquired 350,000 shares for $12,811.84, increasing his direct holding to 23,581,963 shares while his existing options and indirect shareholding through 16Psyche Pty Ltd remain unchanged, signalling a modest uplift in his equity exposure to the company.

The transaction underscores continued insider participation in Scorpion Minerals’ equity, which may be interpreted by investors as a sign of confidence in the company’s prospects and ongoing projects. While the change is relatively small in percentage terms, director share purchases are often monitored by the market as an indicator of management’s alignment with shareholder interests and expectations for future performance.

The latest update is out from AuMake Ltd. ( (AU:AUK) ).

AuMake Limited reported that all resolutions put to shareholders at its general meeting on 13 March 2026 were passed by poll, reflecting strong investor support across the agenda. The approved items included ratification of prior share placements, approval to issue free-attaching options, a change of company name and constitutional amendments, as well as the grant of incentive options to directors.

The high approval margins on capital-raising ratifications and director incentive packages signal solid backing for the board’s current strategic and capital management direction. The successful vote to change the company’s name and amend its constitution suggests AuMake is preparing for a refreshed corporate identity and governance framework, with potential implications for how it positions itself in the market and engages with investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:AUK) stock is a Sell with a A$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on AuMake Ltd. stock, see the AU:AUK Stock Forecast page.

More about AuMake Ltd.

AuMake Limited is an Australia-based company listed on the ASX that historically operates in the retail and tourism-related consumer goods sector, with a focus on serving Asian consumers and daigou shoppers. The company’s activities typically centre on sourcing and distributing Australian and New Zealand products to offshore and visiting customers through physical and online channels.

data.title: Predict’s Mistral Breath Test Enters Occupational Medicine in Landmark Milan Study
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Predict S.P.A. Class B ( (IT:PRE) ) has shared an announcement.

Predict S.p.A., an Italian med-tech specialist in diagnostic imaging, breath analysis and digital healthcare, has built a portfolio that includes its Mistral breath-analysis technology, the Aphel AI platform for robotic support, and the Optip holopresence system for remote medical consultation and training. The company leverages long-term partnerships with major Italian academic and clinical centers to advance innovative, non-invasive healthcare solutions.

The Military Hospital Center in Milan has launched Italy’s first occupational-medicine study using Predict’s Mistral Sampler to monitor automotive-sector workers’ exposure to volatile organic compounds via non-invasive breath analysis. The pilot, which also marks Mistral’s first deployment in Lombardy, aims to validate breath testing as a rapid, complementary biomonitoring tool, potentially broadening Predict’s reach into workplace health and strengthening its position in the occupational safety market.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:PRE) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.45 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Predict S.P.A. Class B stock, see the IT:PRE Stock Forecast page.

More about Predict S.P.A. Class B

Predict S.p.A. is an Italian med-tech SME focused on in vivo diagnostics, breath analysis and digital healthcare solutions. Organized into four business units, it distributes ultrasound and radiological imaging equipment, develops the Mistral breath-analysis platform, and offers augmented reality and robotics tools for clinicians and healthcare operators. The company collaborates with leading Italian university hospitals and research institutes and operates from Bari with a secondary office in Milan.

Average Trading Volume: 25,461

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €6.44M

Learn more about PRE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Standard Chartered advances buy-back with US$191m deployed and share count cut
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) has provided an announcement.

Standard Chartered has continued executing its share buy-back programme, repurchasing 900,000 ordinary shares on 12 March 2026 through J.P. Morgan Securities across the London Stock Exchange and CBOE venues at a volume-weighted average price of about 1,609 GB pence. The bank has now deployed more than US$191 million on the buy-back, and plans to cancel the repurchased shares, reducing the share count to 2.24 billion and marginally increasing earnings per share and voting power for remaining shareholders.

The latest tranche of buy-backs underscores management’s ongoing capital-return strategy and signals confidence in the group’s balance sheet and future earnings capacity. By shrinking its equity base while operating within pre-set regulatory parameters, Standard Chartered is aligning with peers in using excess capital to enhance shareholder value, which may support the stock’s valuation in a competitive global banking sector.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a London-headquartered international banking group incorporated in England and Wales, listed in Hong Kong and other major markets. The bank provides a broad range of financial services, with a strong presence in Asia, Africa and the Middle East, and operates through retail, commercial and institutional banking franchises focused on cross-border and emerging markets.
